title: Workflow State
description: Schema for .workflow-state.json — tracks the current state of the agentic-workflows engine across features and phases.

active_feature.description: The slug of the currently active feature, or null if idle.

worker.description: Identifier of the worker (agent or user) currently operating.

features.description: Map of feature slugs to their workflow state.

workspaces.description: Registry of JJ workspaces (primary workspace only). Maps workspace slug to its metadata.

workspace_meta.description: Pointer back to primary workspace (secondary JJ workspaces only).

feature.description: State for a single feature being tracked through the workflow.

phase.description: Current workflow phase for this feature.

phase_status.description: Status of the current phase. 'idle' when the phase has been entered but the agent has not started work. 'inprogress' when the agent is actively working. 'completed' when the phase's gate conditions (other than phase_status itself) are satisfied. 'completed' does NOT auto-advance — the workflow stays on the phase until the user (or orchestra at user direction) explicitly triggers transition to the next phase.

phase_entered.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the current phase was entered.

type.description: Kind of work being done. Captured from the user's intake message.

initial_request.description: Raw text of the user's intake request for this feature/bug/improvement. Feeds the brainstorming phase.

brainstorming.description: Brainstorming phase artifacts. Populated by frndos-brainstorm.

prd_path.description: Relative path to the main PRD file for this feature, or null if not yet created.

implementation_strategy.description: Recognized implementation strategy chosen by the user at the start of the implementation phase. 'wireframe_then_implementation' = build the web UI on the feature branch with mock/static data first, then swap stubs for real API calls. 'implementation_only' = jump straight to full implementation. Asked only when web-service work is in scope.

parent_feature.description: Slug of the parent feature when this feature is a sub-PRD split from a larger PRD. E.g. 'brand-health-dashboard-p0' has parent_feature 'brand-health-dashboard'. Null for standalone features.

sub_features.description: When a PRD was split into priority-ordered sub-PRDs (P0/P1/P2/...), this lists the child feature slugs. Set on the parent entry to track the split.

branch.description: Git branch name for feature implementation (feature/<worker>/vc-<slug>), or null if not yet created. Created during the prd_splitting phase.

service_prds.description: Map of service names to their per-service PRD file paths.

pr_urls.description: Map of service names to their GitHub pull request URLs.

pr_review_summary.description: Summary of frndos-pr's self code-review, written into the PR body. Recorded here for gate checks.

security_audit_summary.description: Summary of the security-reviewer skill audit, written into the PR body. Recorded here for gate checks.

agent_state.description: Current attention state of the agent driving this feature. null = working/resuming. 'needs_approval' = a plan or destructive action awaits user approval (e.g. ExitPlanMode just fired). 'needs_answer' = a structured question was just asked (e.g. AskUserQuestion fired). 'needs_human' = stuck on something requiring free-form human judgment, no structured options. Consumed by the loki GUI shell and orchestra to decide whether to surface the feature for user attention. Always paired with agent_state_reason when non-null.

agent_state_reason.description: Short human-readable string describing why the agent is in its current attention state. Required to be a non-empty string when agent_state is non-null. MUST be null when agent_state is null. Example: 'Plan for splitter ready, awaiting approval', 'Asked which implementation strategy to use', 'Stuck on PR conflict resolution, need guidance'.

agent_teams.description: Agent Teams state for parallel implementation (Claude Code only). Null or absent when using sequential strategy.

allOf.description: agent_state_reason MUST be a non-empty string when agent_state is non-null, and MUST be null when agent_state is null.

brainstorming.description: Brainstorming phase output. Captured by frndos-brainstorm and consumed by frndos-prd.

summary.description: Final brainstorming summary written by the agent. Non-empty once the phase is completed. Feeds the PRD's Brainstorming Outcome section.

service_state_snapshots.description: Map of service name to a short snapshot of its latest relevant state (paths/symbols/known-good behaviors) that informed the brainstorm. Optional but recommended.

lark_doc_url.description: URL of the synced Brainstorming docx in the user's Lark wiki area (User's Area/<Worker>'s Universe/<slug>/Brainstorming). Written by /lark-sync push-brainstorming. Null until first sync.

answer.description: The chosen option's value, or free-text 'Other' content. Null until the user answers.

recommended.description: Exactly one option per question should have recommended === true.

agent_teams.description: Agent Teams state for parallel implementation. Tracks per-service engineer progress.

strategy.description: Implementation strategy: agent_teams (parallel, Claude Code) or sequential (Cursor/OpenCode).

engineers.description: Map of service names to their engineer teammate state.

engineer_state.description: State for a single per-service engineer teammate.

status.description: Current status of this engineer's work.

pr_url.description: GitHub PR URL created by this engineer, or null.

tasks_completed.description: Number of tasks completed by this engineer.

workspace_entry.description: Registry entry for a JJ workspace (stored in primary workspace only).

path.description: Relative path to the workspace directory (e.g., '../frndos-feature-b').

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the workspace was created.

worker.description: Identifier of the worker who created this workspace.

workspace_meta.description: Metadata for a secondary JJ workspace — points back to the primary workspace.

primary_workspace.description: Relative path to the primary workspace (e.g., '../frndos').

feature_slug.description: The feature slug this workspace was created for.

is_jj_workspace.description: Always true for JJ workspaces. Used for quick detection.
